name: Cow Cow Davenport
abstract: Charles Edward "Cow Cow" Davenport (April 23, 1894 – December 3, 1955) was an American boogie-woogie and piano blues player as well as a vaudeville entertainer. He also played the organ and sang.

about_quotes.speaker: Art Hodes
about_quotes.evidence: But with Cow Cow don't think there was any words. It was very simple.
